releaseBody:
- LilyGO T-Lora Pager: XL9555, BQ27220, ST7796, encoder, optional RGB/DIO2, OTA env; battery telemetry fix.
- Web flasher: merged bins and manifests 1.5.21 for Heltec V3, V4, V3 Paper, LilyGO T-Lora Pager.
- Roadmap bullets in CUSTOM_PROTOCOL_PLAN §6.1 for flasher parser.
- Synced firmware and app version 1.5.21.
